dublinCore.dc:title: 118 HRES 205 EH: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives and ranking a Member on a certain standing committee of the House of Representatives.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives and ranking a Member on a certain standing committee of the House of Representatives.

section.text: That the following named Members be, and are hereby, elected to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mrs. McClellan (to rank immediately after Mr. Davis of North Carolina).

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Science, Space, and Technology:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mrs. McClellan (to rank immediately after Ms. Lee of Pennsylvania).

section.text: That the following named Member be, and is hereby, ranked as follows on the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Panetta (to rank immediately after Mr. Doggett).
